pattern: Agent premature completion without full-featured communication
insight: The SelectionActor logic was returning a generic 'Task finished' string when no tool call was detected, even if the model content contained a detailed summary. Additionally, the ChannelRouter was defaulting to generic strings if finalOutcome was missing. Strengthening the COMPLETION PROTOCOL in the prompt and explicitly capturing the final synthesis in the execution node ensures the agent communicates as a high-fidelity operator.
correction: Modified executionNodes.ts to capture response.content as finalOutcome. Updated channelRouter.ts to prioritize finalOutcome. Updated prompt.ts to mandate a Final Synthesis rule.
reccomendation: Always ensure the 'last turn' of an autonomous agent is treated as a communication turn, not just an exit code. Explicitly prompt for a recap in the final step.
